eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; Arizona; at 1:52 PM on JUL 8, 2026 Effective until 9:52 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Howard Harrison was last seen on 07/06/2026 at 1230 hours in the area of 20th Street and Thomas Road. Howard is described as a 62-year-old male, with black eyes and a bald head with little gray fuzz. He is approximately 5 feet 5 inches tall and weighs 247 pounds. 
Howard left his assisted living group home in his black wheelchair with an unknown clothing description. Howard suffers from a medical condition which may cause him to become confused and easily lost. Howard does not have a cell phone and he can self-identify. Howard may have a small amount of cash with him, but he does not have access to additional funds. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
